name: VPN Brute Force Attempt
description: Failed VPN authentication followed by successful connection from same IP

name: Potential Credential Compromise
description: Multiple failed logins on AD followed by successful VPN from unusual location

name: 802.1X Authentication Chain
description: NPS authentication correlated with FortiSwitch port auth and DHCP lease

name: Lateral Movement Detection
description: Logon from new source followed by remote service access to different target

name: Backup Failure Investigation
description: Veeam session failure correlated with Hyper-V or storage events

name: HA + BGP Failover Correlation
description: FortiGate HA failover event correlated with BGP route changes

name: Cross-Platform Threat Detection
description: Defender endpoint alert correlated with FortiGate UTM event for same IP/host

name: Certificate-Related Service Issue
description: Certificate expiry warning followed by service restart or connection failure

name: Configuration Change Impact
description: FortiManager config push followed by tunnel or connectivity issues

name: NPS Failure to AD Lockout
description: Multiple NPS rejections followed by AD account lockout for same user
